candidate_test_values.selection_reason: These values stay close to the current `> 0` cutoff, probe only a narrow stricter-positive range, and avoid turning the experiment into a broad search.

evaluation_protocol.comparison_basis: compare every tested threshold against the current frozen-stack baseline already documented
evaluation_protocol.walk_forward_split_rule: use the same walk-forward split as the current frozen-stack evaluation
evaluation_protocol.realism_cost_rule: use the same realism cost policy already documented
evaluation_protocol.window_reporting_rule: report both out_of_sample and final_holdout explicitly
evaluation_protocol.criteria_freeze_rule: do not change pass criteria after results are seen
evaluation_protocol.single_variable_rule: only the return_20d absolute momentum floor may vary across runs

minimum_pass_criteria.metric_basis: same walk-forward evaluation with the same realism-cost policy already documented

failure_conditions: Fail if out-of-sample average return per trade remains less than or equal to 0.0.
Fail if out-of-sample max drawdown remains greater than or equal to 35.0%.
Fail if holdout average return per trade stays below -0.1.
Fail if trade count falls below 350 in the evaluated window set.
Fail if holdout performance becomes worse than the current frozen stack after costs.

minimum_outputs: before_vs_after_by_window relative to the current frozen stack baseline
explicit pass_or_fail against the frozen criteria
reporting_requirements.no_ambiguity_rule: All candidate thresholds must be reported, not only the best-looking row.

not_allowed_changes: Do not change the Layer 2 `close > ema50` leg.
Do not activate or retune Layer 3.
Do not change the 12-day time stop.
Do not change realism cost policy.
Do not change corporate-action ATR temporary policy.
Do not loosen pass criteria after results are seen.
Do not add any second variable.
